name: Xiangyang Automobile Bearing Co., Ltd.
summary: Xiangyang Automobile Bearing Co., Ltd. researches, develops, manufactures, and sells automobile bearings in China. The company offers ball, TRB, NRB, CRB, CHB, CVJ, CJ, and other bearings. It also provides various bearing products in the areas of machinery, agricultural machinery, household appliances, wind power, etc. The company serves various heavy-duty, middle-duty, light-duty, and original equipment markets, as well as aftermarket. It also exports its products to Europe, the United States, Southeast Asia, and other countries and regions. The company was founded in 1968 and is based in Xiangyang, China. Xiangyang Automobile Bearing Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Tri-Ring Group Co.,Ltd.
